label: KB Document Status
description: Lifecycle states for KB entity documents (per DESIGN.md §3.1). FLAG_RECORD and BOOTSTRAP_RECORD override the default to 'published' on create.

terms.label: Reviewed
terms.description: Reviewed by a human or YAC; ready for publication or use.

terms.label: Published
terms.description: Visible as canonical KB content. FLAG_RECORD and BOOTSTRAP_RECORD default here.

terms.label: Deprecated
terms.description: Superseded but still resolvable; kept for historical reference.

terms.label: Archived
terms.description: Hidden from default views; remains in storage.
